_meta.doc: Bot Liveness v2 chat corpus — assembled by tools/bot_chat_generator/validate_corpus.py from Sonnet-generated batches + legacy v1 templates + lexicon.json. Do not hand-edit templates here; regenerate. _meta.config is read into BotEngine chatCfg_ at loadBotChatPhrases (hot-reloadable via /cavebot reload). Placeholders: %city %town %vocation %item %price %stack %creature %spawn %level.
